Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a cluster shard

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} deleted cluster shard {object.value} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting cluster shard {object.value} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change cluster shard {object.value} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to add cluster shard {object.value} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete cluster shard {object.value} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed cluster shard {object.value} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is adding cluster shard {object.value} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} added cluster shard {object.value} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing cluster shard {object.value} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
